core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Code Aesthetics with Editorial Design
Emotion First: Every pixel must signal 'High Quality'
Content is King: Project cards are the heroes
Negative Space: Use 'p-12' or 'p-16' to let content breathe
Contrast: High contrast text for readability, subtle glass for surfaces

rules: Use 'Outfit' for all Headings (h1-h6). Weight: 700 or 800 for Hero, 500 for cards.
Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for all body text, descriptions, and long form content.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for skill tags, code snippets, and stats.
Heading 1: text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold
Heading 2: text-3xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-white

strategies: Hero Section: Split layout (Text Left 7 cols, Visual Right 5 cols).
Skills: Category-based masonry or dense grid.
Projects: Alternating layout (Image Left/Text Right then Image Right/Text Left) or 2-col grid for cards.

features: Typing Animation for roles (MERN Stack Developer, Full Stack Engineer)
Call to Action: 'View Projects' (Primary) and 'Contact Me' (Secondary/Outline)
Social Links: Floating or below CTA
Short bio highlighting 'Bhopal, India' origin and passion.
Profile Image: Use a professional placeholder or one of the developer images.

skills.style: Glassmorphic cards with icon + name. Hover: Glow effect.

experience.style: Left-aligned date, Right-aligned content, connected by a vertical line with dots.

features: Links: GitHub (Icon), Live Demo (External Link Icon)

mini_projects.features: Name, Description, Star count, Language, Link

contact.style: Minimalist inputs with bottom border or subtle background fill.

footer.content: Copyright 2024 Gaurav Athode. Made with React & FastAPI.

visual_enhancers.glows: Use colored blurs (indigo/purple) behind key elements (Hero image, Featured Project).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'framer-motion' for animations, 'lucide-react' for icons, 'react-type-animation' for hero.
2. Theme: Force DARK MODE. Do not create a toggle. Hardcode dark styles.
3. API: Ensure FastAPI backend has endpoints for '/api/github-stats' and '/api/projects'. Mock if necessary initially.
4. Responsive: Mobile first. Stack columns on mobile, expand to grid on desktop.
5. Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios are high (Slate-400 on Slate-950 is borderline, use Slate-300 for body if needed).
6. Navigation: Sticky glass header with sections: Home, About, Skills, Projects, Contact.
universal_guidelines: No gradients on text unless it's a very large heading.
Do not use default Scrollbars. Hide them or style them thin.
Every interactive element must have a hover state.
Use data-testid for all clickable elements.
